results.description: CALCULATED_COLUMN: Asset propagation risk calculation
results.question: Create a calculated column for asset propagation risk score that combines propagation_class impact and bastion device status and add it to the dev assets table
results.sql: ALTER TABLE dev_assets ADD COLUMN propagation_risk_score DECIMAL AS ( SELECT numeric_score FROM risk_impact_metadata WHERE enum_type = 'propagation_class' AND code = (CASE WHEN dev_assets.is_bastion_device = TRUE THEN 'Bastion' ELSE (CASE WHEN <condition_for_perimeter> THEN 'Perimeter' ELSE 'Core' END) END));

calculation_steps.description: Classify asset propagation class based on device type and bastion device status.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: CASE WHEN dev_assets.is_bastion_device = TRUE THEN 'Bastion' ELSE (CASE WHEN <condition_for_perimeter> THEN 'Perimeter' ELSE 'Core' END) END AS calculated_propagation_class

calculation_steps.description: Retrieve numeric score for the classified propagation class from risk_impact_metadata.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT numeric_score FROM risk_impact_metadata WHERE enum_type = 'propagation_class' AND code = calculated_propagation_class

calculation_steps.description: Create calculated column for asset propagation risk score based on the retrieved numeric score.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: ALTER TABLE dev_assets ADD COLUMN propagation_risk_score DECIMAL AS (SELECT numeric_score FROM risk_impact_metadata WHERE enum_type = 'propagation_class' AND code = calculated_propagation_class)

results.description: CALCULATED_COLUMN: Raw impact score calculation using impact_class and classification metadata
results.question: Calculate the raw_impact score for each asset based on impact_class and asset classification criticality scores
results.sql: SELECT a.dev_id, (COALESCE(( SELECT numeric_score FROM risk_impact_metadata WHERE enum_type='impact_class' AND code=CASE WHEN roles_metadata.criticality_score >= 90 THEN 'Mission Critical' WHEN roles_metadata.criticality_score >= 70 THEN 'Critical' ELSE 'Other' END), 0) * 0.7 + (roles_metadata.criticality_score * 0.3)) AS raw_impact FROM assets AS a JOIN roles_metadata ON a.dev_id = roles_metadata.dev_id;

calculation_steps.description: Classify asset impact class based on roles and asset tags
calculation_steps.sql_expression: CASE WHEN roles_metadata.criticality_score >= 90 THEN 'Mission Critical' WHEN roles_metadata.criticality_score >= 70 THEN 'Critical' ELSE 'Other' END AS impact_class

calculation_steps.description: Retrieve numeric scores for impact_class from risk_impact_metadata
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT numeric_score FROM risk_impact_metadata WHERE enum_type='impact_class' AND code=impact_class

calculation_steps.description: Calculate raw_impact score based on impact_class and criticality scores
calculation_steps.sql_expression: raw_impact = (impact_class_score * 0.7) + (criticality_score * 0.3)

results.description: CALCULATED_COLUMN: Raw risk score combining impact and likelihood
results.question: Calculate raw_risk score for each asset by combining raw_impact and raw_likelihood with appropriate weighting
results.sql: SELECT a.dev_id, (SUM(a.raw_impact * 0.7) + SUM(a.raw_likelihood * 0.3)) AS raw_risk FROM vulnerability_instances AS a GROUP BY a.dev_id;

calculation_steps.description: Calculate raw_risk score by combining raw_impact and raw_likelihood with appropriate weighting.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: raw_risk = (raw_impact * 0.7) + (raw_likelihood * 0.3)

results.description: CALCULATED_COLUMN: Bastion impact score for bastion devices
results.question: Create a calculated column for bastion_impact that calculates impact score specifically for bastion host devices using impact_class and propagation_class
results.sql: SELECT LEAST(( SELECT propagation_score.numeric_score FROM risk_impact_metadata AS propagation_score WHERE propagation_score.enum_type = 'propagation_class' AND propagation_score.code = CASE WHEN dev_assets.is_bastion_device = TRUE THEN 'Bastion' ELSE 'Core' END) * 1.3 + ( SELECT impact_score.numeric_score FROM risk_impact_metadata AS impact_score WHERE impact_score.enum_type = 'impact_class' AND impact_score.code = CASE WHEN dev_assets.is_bastion_device = TRUE THEN 'Bastion' ELSE NULL END) * 0.2, 100) AS bastion_impact FROM dev_assets WHERE dev_assets.is_bastion_device = TRUE;

calculation_steps.description: Check if the asset is a bastion device
calculation_steps.sql_expression: CASE WHEN dev_assets.is_bastion_device = TRUE THEN 'Bastion' ELSE NULL END AS calculated_impact_class

calculation_steps.description: Determine the propagation class based on network interfaces
calculation_steps.sql_expression: CASE WHEN <network_interface_conditions> THEN 'Perimeter' ELSE 'Core' END AS calculated_propagation_class

calculation_steps.description: Retrieve numeric scores for impact and propagation classes from risk_impact_metadata
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT impact_score.numeric_score AS impact_score, propagation_score.numeric_score AS propagation_score FROM risk_impact_metadata AS impact_score JOIN risk_impact_metadata AS propagation_score ON impact_score.enum_type = 'impact_class' AND impact_score.code = calculated_impact_class AND propagation_score.enum_type = 'propagation_class' AND propagation_score.code = calculated_propagation_class

calculation_steps.description: Calculate bastion impact score using the formula
calculation_steps.sql_expression: bastion_impact = (propagation_score * 1.3) + (impact_score * 0.2)

calculation_steps.description: Cap the final score at 100
calculation_steps.sql_expression: bastion_impact = LEAST(bastion_impact, 100)

results.description: CALCULATED_COLUMN: Propagation impact based on propagation_class and network topology
results.question: Calculate propagation_impact score for each asset using propagation_class enum and network relationship factors
results.sql: SELECT dev_assets.nuid, dev_assets.dev_id, dev_assets.device_type, dev_assets.device_subtype, dev_assets.location_region, risk_impact_metadata.numeric_score AS propagation_impact_score FROM dev_assets JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN (interface_access_type = 'public' OR subnet_classification = 'Public/Other') THEN 'Perimeter' ELSE 'Core' END AS calculated_propagation_class, dev_assets.nuid FROM dev_assets) AS classified_assets ON dev_assets.nuid = classified_assets.nuid JOIN risk_impact_metadata ON risk_impact_metadata.enum_type = 'propagation_class' AND risk_impact_metadata.code = classified_assets.calculated_propagation_class;

calculation_steps.description: Classify asset's propagation class based on network interface characteristics
calculation_steps.sql_expression: CASE WHEN (interface_access_type = 'public' OR subnet_classification = 'Public/Other') THEN 'Perimeter' ELSE 'Core' END AS calculated_propagation_class

calculation_steps.description: Join the dev_assets table with roles_metadata to assess roles and their criticality
calculation_steps.sql_expression: JOIN roles_metadata ON dev_assets.roles = roles_metadata.code

calculation_steps.description: Join the risk_impact_metadata table to retrieve numeric scores for the classified propagation class
calculation_steps.sql_expression: JOIN risk_impact_metadata ON risk_impact_metadata.enum_type = 'propagation_class' AND risk_impact_metadata.code = calculated_propagation_class

calculation_steps.description: Select the numeric score for the propagation class
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT risk_impact_metadata.numeric_score AS propagation_impact_score

results.description: METRIC: Risk by asset classification with risk density
results.question: Show me vulnerability risk metrics by asset classification type with calculated risk per asset ratios
results.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN dev_assets.device_type IN ('Server', 'Workstation') THEN 'Critical' WHEN dev_assets.device_type IN ('Laptop', 'Desktop') THEN 'Other' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS asset_classification_type, SUM(vulnerability_metadata.risk_score) / COUNT(dev_assets.nuid) AS vulnerability_risk_ratio FROM dev_assets LEFT JOIN vulnerability_metadata ON dev_assets.nuid = vulnerability_metadata.nuid GROUP BY asset_classification_type;

calculation_steps.description: Classify asset based on device type and roles to determine asset classification type.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: CASE WHEN dev_assets.device_type IN ('Server', 'Workstation') THEN 'Critical' WHEN dev_assets.device_type IN ('Laptop', 'Desktop') THEN 'Other' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS asset_classification_type

calculation_steps.description: Calculate vulnerability risk for each asset by aggregating risk scores from vulnerability metadata.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SUM(vulnerability_metadata.risk_score) AS total_vulnerability_risk

calculation_steps.description: Calculate risk per asset ratio by dividing total vulnerability risk by the number of assets.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: total_vulnerability_risk / COUNT(dev_assets.nuid) AS vulnerability_risk_ratio

group_by_columns.asset_classification_type: CASE WHEN dev_assets.device_type IN ('Server', 'Workstation') THEN 'Critical' WHEN dev_assets.device_type IN ('Laptop', 'Desktop') THEN 'Other' ELSE 'Unknown' END

results.description: METRIC: Breach likelihood by propagation with blast radius
results.question: Create a metric showing breach method likelihood by propagation class with calculated blast radius impact
results.sql: SELECT propagation_class, AVG(breach_likelihood) AS breach_likelihood FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN (network_interfaces.access_type = 'public' OR network_interfaces.site_location IN ('DMZ', 'perimeter')) THEN 'Perimeter' ELSE 'Core' END AS propagation_class, (breach_method_metadata.risk_score * calculate_asset_exposure_score(CASE WHEN (network_interfaces.access_type = 'public' OR network_interfaces.site_location IN ('DMZ', 'perimeter')) THEN 'Perimeter' ELSE 'Core' END)) AS breach_likelihood FROM breach_method_metadata JOIN assets ON assets.breach_method = breach_method_metadata.code JOIN network_interfaces ON assets.dev_id = network_interfaces.dev_id) AS subquery GROUP BY propagation_class;

calculation_steps.description: Classify asset's propagation class based on network interfaces.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: CASE WHEN (network_interfaces.access_type = 'public' OR network_interfaces.site_location IN ('DMZ', 'perimeter')) THEN 'Perimeter' ELSE 'Core' END AS propagation_class

calculation_steps.description: Retrieve breach method likelihood based on propagation class and breach method scores.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT (breach_method_metadata.risk_score * calculate_asset_exposure_score(propagation_class)) AS breach_likelihood FROM breach_method_metadata WHERE breach_method_metadata.code = assets.breach_method

calculation_steps.description: Combine scores to create a final metric for breach method likelihood by propagation class.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT propagation_class, AVG(breach_likelihood) AS breach_likelihood FROM (SELECT propagation_class, (breach_method_metadata.risk_score * calculate_asset_exposure_score(propagation_class)) AS breach_likelihood FROM breach_method_metadata JOIN assets ON assets.breach_method = breach_method_metadata.code) AS subquery GROUP BY propagation_class

results.description: CALCULATED_COLUMN: Raw likelihood score using breach method and exposure calculations
results.question: Create a calculated field for raw_likelihood that estimates the likelihood of an asset being compromised based on breach method likelihoods and asset exposure
results.sql: SELECT (SUM(breach_risk_score * 0.5 + security_strength_score * 0.3 + impact_score * 0.2) / COUNT(*)) AS raw_likelihood FROM vulnerability_instances;

calculation_steps.description: Calculate raw likelihood based on breach method risk and asset exposure
calculation_steps.sql_expression: raw_likelihood = (breach_risk_score * 0.5 + security_strength_score * 0.3 + impact_score * 0.2)

results.description: COLUMN_TRANSFORMATION: Time calculations and decay factors
results.question: Transform vulnerability detection dates to show days since detection and calculate time-weighted risk decay factor
results.sql: SELECT DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, vi.detected_time) AS days_since_detection, EXP(-DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, vi.detected_time) / 30.0) AS decay_factor FROM vulnerability_instances vi;

calculation_steps.description: Calculate days since detection for each vulnerability
calculation_steps.sql_expression: DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, vulnerability_instances.detected_time) AS days_since_detection

calculation_steps.description: Calculate time-weighted risk decay factor using exponential decay
calculation_steps.sql_expression: EXP(-days_since_detection / 30.0) AS decay_factor

results.description: AGGREGATION_TRANSFORMATION: Weighted raw_risk by asset criticality
results.question: Calculate weighted average raw_risk score where weight is based on asset criticality score from asset_classification_metadata, grouped by device type
results.sql: SELECT asset_info.device_type, AVG(asset_info.raw_risk_score * asset_info.criticality_score) / SUM(asset_info.criticality_score) AS weighted_average_raw_risk FROM ( SELECT dev_assets.device_type, asset_classification_metadata.criticality_score, risk_impact_metadata.numeric_score AS raw_risk_score FROM dev_assets JOIN asset_classification_metadata ON dev_assets.device_type = asset_classification_metadata.code JOIN risk_impact_metadata ON risk_impact_metadata.enum_type = 'risk_level' AND risk_impact_metadata.code = 'raw_risk') AS asset_info GROUP BY asset_info.device_type;

calculation_steps.description: Join dev_assets with asset_classification_metadata to retrieve criticality scores.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT dev_assets.device_type, asset_classification_metadata.criticality_score FROM dev_assets JOIN asset_classification_metadata ON dev_assets.device_type = asset_classification_metadata.code

calculation_steps.description: Join the result with risk_impact_metadata to retrieve raw_risk scores.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT device_type, criticality_score, risk_impact_metadata.numeric_score AS raw_risk_score FROM (SELECT dev_assets.device_type, asset_classification_metadata.criticality_score FROM dev_assets JOIN asset_classification_metadata ON dev_assets.device_type = asset_classification_metadata.code) AS asset_info JOIN risk_impact_metadata ON risk_impact_metadata.enum_type = 'risk_level' AND risk_impact_metadata.code = 'raw_risk'

calculation_steps.description: Calculate the weighted average raw_risk score based on criticality scores, grouped by device type.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT device_type, AVG(raw_risk_score * criticality_score) / SUM(criticality_score) AS weighted_average_raw_risk FROM (SELECT dev_assets.device_type, asset_classification_metadata.criticality_score, risk_impact_metadata.numeric_score AS raw_risk_score FROM dev_assets JOIN asset_classification_metadata ON dev_assets.device_type = asset_classification_metadata.code JOIN risk_impact_metadata ON risk_impact_metadata.enum_type = 'risk_level' AND risk_impact_metadata.code = 'raw_risk') AS asset_info GROUP BY device_type

results.description: CALCULATED_COLUMN: Lateral movement risk calculation
results.question: Create a calculated field for lateral movement risk that combines bastion device status, propagation class, and trust relationships using propagation_impact and bastion_impact
results.sql: SELECT (CASE WHEN is_bastion_device = TRUE THEN bastion_impact ELSE 0 END * 0.3) + (propagation_impact * 0.7) AS lateral_movement_risk FROM dev_assets;

calculation_steps.description: Determine if the asset is a bastion device and retrieve its impact score.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT CASE WHEN is_bastion_device = TRUE THEN bastion_impact ELSE 0 END AS bastion_impact_score FROM dev_assets

calculation_steps.description: Retrieve the propagation impact score based on the propagation class.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT propagation_impact FROM dev_assets WHERE propagation_class = (SELECT propagation_class FROM dev_assets)

calculation_steps.description: Calculate the lateral movement risk by combining the bastion impact and propagation impact.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT (bastion_impact_score * 0.3) + (propagation_impact * 0.7) AS lateral_movement_risk FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN is_bastion_device = TRUE THEN bastion_impact ELSE 0 END AS bastion_impact_score, propagation_impact FROM dev_assets)

results.description: METRIC: Monthly risk trends with cumulative exposure
results.question: Show me monthly vulnerability risk metrics with calculated fields for month-over-month raw_risk change and cumulative risk exposure
results.sql: WITH monthly_risk AS ( SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', vulnerability_instances.detected_time) AS month, SUM(risk_impact_metadata.risk_score) AS raw_risk_exposure FROM vulnerability_instances JOIN risk_impact_metadata ON vulnerability_instances.vulnerability_code = risk_impact_metadata.code GROUP BY month), raw_risk_change AS ( SELECT current.month, (current.raw_risk_exposure - previous.raw_risk_exposure) AS raw_risk_change FROM monthly_risk AS current JOIN monthly_risk AS previous ON current.month = previous.month + INTERVAL '1 month'), cumulative_risk AS ( SELECT month, SUM(raw_risk_exposure) OVER ( ORDER BY month ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cumulative_risk_exposure FROM monthly_risk) SELECT m.month, r.raw_risk_change, c.cumulative_risk_exposure FROM monthly_risk m LEFT JOIN raw_risk_change r ON m.month = r.month LEFT JOIN cumulative_risk c ON m.month = c.month ORDER BY m.month;

calculation_steps.description: Calculate raw risk exposure by summing up risk scores from vulnerabilities for each asset per month.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', vulnerability_instances.detected_time) AS month, SUM(risk_impact_metadata.risk_score) AS raw_risk_exposure FROM vulnerability_instances JOIN risk_impact_metadata ON vulnerability_instances.vulnerability_code = risk_impact_metadata.code GROUP BY month

calculation_steps.description: Calculate month-over-month raw risk change by comparing current month's raw risk exposure with previous month's.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT current.month, (current.raw_risk_exposure - previous.raw_risk_exposure) AS raw_risk_change FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', vulnerability_instances.detected_time) AS month, SUM(risk_impact_metadata.risk_score) AS raw_risk_exposure FROM vulnerability_instances JOIN risk_impact_metadata ON vulnerability_instances.vulnerability_code = risk_impact_metadata.code GROUP BY month) AS current JOIN (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', vulnerability_instances.detected_time) AS month, SUM(risk_impact_metadata.risk_score) AS raw_risk_exposure FROM vulnerability_instances JOIN risk_impact_metadata ON vulnerability_instances.vulnerability_code = risk_impact_metadata.code GROUP BY month) AS previous ON current.month = previous.month + INTERVAL '1 month'

calculation_steps.description: Calculate cumulative risk exposure over time.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT month, SUM(raw_risk_exposure) OVER (ORDER BY month ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cumulative_risk_exposure FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', vulnerability_instances.detected_time) AS month, SUM(risk_impact_metadata.risk_score) AS raw_risk_exposure FROM vulnerability_instances JOIN risk_impact_metadata ON vulnerability_instances.vulnerability_code = risk_impact_metadata.code GROUP BY month) AS monthly_risk

aggregations.cumulative_risk_exposure: SUM(raw_risk_exposure) OVER (ORDER BY month ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)

results.description: COLUMN_TRANSFORMATION: Classification enrichment and impact calculation
results.question: Transform asset classification codes to descriptions and create a calculated field for classification impact multiplier that affects raw_impact calculation
results.sql: SELECT dev_assets.device_type, dev_assets.roles, CASE WHEN dev_assets.device_type IN ('Servers', 'Critical Services') THEN 'Mission Critical' WHEN dev_assets.device_type IN ('Workstations', 'Desktops') THEN 'Critical' ELSE 'Other' END AS impact_class, ( SELECT numeric_score FROM risk_impact_metadata WHERE enum_type = 'impact_class' AND code = CASE WHEN dev_assets.device_type IN ('Servers', 'Critical Services') THEN 'Mission Critical' WHEN dev_assets.device_type IN ('Workstations', 'Desktops') THEN 'Critical' ELSE 'Other' END) AS classification_impact_multiplier FROM dev_assets;

calculation_steps.description: Classify asset impact class based on device type and roles
calculation_steps.sql_expression: CASE WHEN dev_assets.device_type IN ('Servers', 'Critical Services') THEN 'Mission Critical' WHEN dev_assets.device_type IN ('Workstations', 'Desktops') THEN 'Critical' ELSE 'Other' END AS impact_class

calculation_steps.description: Join with asset_classification_metadata to retrieve classification descriptions
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT asset_classification_metadata.code AS classification_code, asset_classification_metadata.priority_order, asset_classification_metadata.criticality_score FROM asset_classification_metadata WHERE dev_assets.device_type = asset_classification_metadata.code

calculation_steps.description: Retrieve numeric scores for each impact class from risk_impact_metadata
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT risk_impact_metadata.numeric_score FROM risk_impact_metadata WHERE risk_impact_metadata.enum_type = 'impact_class' AND risk_impact_metadata.code = impact_class

calculation_steps.description: Calculate the classification impact multiplier for raw_impact
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT (impact_score * 0.7) + (propagation_score * 0.3) AS classification_impact_multiplier

results.description: AGGREGATION_TRANSFORMATION: Raw risk distribution by classification
results.question: Calculate the percentage of total raw_risk score for each asset classification type relative to all classifications
results.sql: SELECT impact_class, (SUM(numeric_score) / ( SELECT SUM(numeric_score) FROM dev_assets)) * 100 AS percentage_raw_risk FROM dev_assets GROUP BY impact_class;

calculation_steps.description: Calculate total raw_risk score for each asset classification type.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT impact_class, SUM(numeric_score) AS total_raw_risk FROM dev_assets GROUP BY impact_class

calculation_steps.description: Calculate the total sum of raw_risk scores across all classifications.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT SUM(numeric_score) AS total_raw_risk_sum FROM dev_assets

calculation_steps.description: Calculate the percentage of total raw_risk score for each asset classification type.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT impact_class, (SUM(numeric_score) / (SELECT SUM(numeric_score) FROM dev_assets)) * 100 AS percentage_raw_risk FROM dev_assets GROUP BY impact_class

results.description: METRIC: Breach likelihood by impact class with propagation impact
results.question: Create a metric showing breach method likelihood by asset impact class with calculated propagation_impact score
results.sql: WITH impact_classification AS ( SELECT da.dev_id, CASE WHEN rm.criticality_score >= 90 THEN 'Mission Critical' WHEN rm.criticality_score >= 70 THEN 'Critical' ELSE 'Other' END AS impact_class FROM dev_assets da JOIN roles_metadata rm ON da.dev_id = rm.dev_id), propagation_classification AS ( SELECT da.dev_id, CASE WHEN ni.access_type = 'Public' THEN 'Perimeter' ELSE 'Core' END AS propagation_class FROM dev_assets da JOIN network_interfaces ni ON da.dev_id = ni.dev_id), impact_scores AS ( SELECT ic.dev_id, ic.impact_class, pi.numeric_score AS impact_score FROM impact_classification ic JOIN risk_impact_metadata pi ON pi.enum_type = 'impact_class' AND pi.code = ic.impact_class), propagation_scores AS ( SELECT pc.dev_id, pc.propagation_class, ps.numeric_score AS propagation_score FROM propagation_classification pc JOIN risk_impact_metadata ps ON ps.enum_type = 'propagation_class' AND ps.code = pc.propagation_class), breach_method_scores AS ( SELECT dev_id, risk_score AS breach_method_score FROM breach_method_metadata WHERE code = 'unpatched_vulnerability'), combined_scores AS ( SELECT is.dev_id, is.impact_class, ps.propagation_class, (is.impact_score * 0.7) + (ps.propagation_score * 0.3) + (bms.breach_method_score * 0.2) AS breach_method_likelihood FROM impact_scores is JOIN propagation_scores ps ON is.dev_id = ps.dev_id JOIN breach_method_scores bms ON is.dev_id = bms.dev_id) SELECT impact_class, AVG(breach_method_likelihood) AS avg_breach_method_likelihood FROM combined_scores GROUP BY impact_class;

calculation_steps.description: Classify asset impact class based on roles and other criteria using the roles_metadata and risk_impact_metadata tables.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT CASE WHEN roles_metadata.criticality_score >= 90 THEN 'Mission Critical' WHEN roles_metadata.criticality_score >= 70 THEN 'Critical' ELSE 'Other' END AS impact_class FROM dev_assets JOIN roles_metadata ON dev_assets.dev_id = roles_metadata.dev_id

calculation_steps.description: Classify asset propagation class based on network interfaces.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT CASE WHEN <network_interface_conditions> THEN 'Perimeter' ELSE 'Core' END AS propagation_class FROM dev_assets JOIN network_interfaces ON dev_assets.dev_id = network_interfaces.dev_id

calculation_steps.description: Retrieve numeric scores for impact class and propagation class from risk_impact_metadata.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT numeric_score FROM risk_impact_metadata WHERE enum_type='impact_class' AND code=impact_class

calculation_steps.description: Calculate breach method likelihood based on asset classification.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT risk_score FROM breach_method_metadata WHERE code='unpatched_vulnerability'

calculation_steps.description: Combine scores to create a final metric for breach method likelihood using the calculated propagation impact score.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: breach_method_likelihood = (impact_score * 0.7) + (propagation_score * 0.3) + (breach_method_score * 0.2)

results.description: CALCULATED_COLUMN: Comprehensive risk score calculation for raw_risk
results.question: Calculate comprehensive risk score that combines CVSS score, exploitability, impact, time urgency, and asset classification impact multiplier to populate raw_risk
results.sql: SELECT (SUM(cvss_score * 0.4) + SUM(exploitability_score * 0.3) + SUM(impact_score * 0.2) + SUM(time_urgency * 0.1) * SUM(asset_classification_impact_multiplier)) AS raw_risk FROM vulnerability_instances;

calculation_steps.description: Calculate the weighted raw risk score using the provided components.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: raw_risk = (cvss_score * 0.4) + (exploitability_score * 0.3) + (impact_score * 0.2) + (time_urgency * 0.1) * asset_classification_impact_multiplier

results.description: METRIC: Time-weighted raw_risk with Gamma parameters by propagation
results.question: Show me time-weighted raw_risk by propagation class with calculated Gamma distribution parameters for trend forecasting
results.sql: SELECT propagation_class, SUM(vulnerability_metadata.risk_score * EXP(-EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_DATE - vulnerability_metadata.detected_time)) / 2592000)) / SUM(EXP(-EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_DATE - vulnerability_metadata.detected_time)) / 2592000)) AS time_weighted_raw_risk, (SUM(mu_hat^2) / SUM(lambda_hat)) AS alpha, (SUM(mu_hat) / SUM(lambda_hat)) AS beta FROM ( SELECT risk_value AS mu_hat, 1/risk_value AS lambda_hat, propagation_class FROM vulnerability_metadata) AS subquery GROUP BY propagation_class;

calculation_steps.description: Calculate time-weighted raw risk based on vulnerabilities
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SUM(vulnerability_metadata.risk_score * EXP(-DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, vulnerability_metadata.detected_time) / 30)) / SUM(EXP(-DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, vulnerability_metadata.detected_time) / 30)) AS time_weighted_raw_risk

calculation_steps.description: Calculate Gamma distribution parameters for trend forecasting
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT (SUM(mu_hat^2) / SUM(lambda_hat)) AS alpha, (SUM(mu_hat) / SUM(lambda_hat)) AS beta FROM (SELECT risk_value AS mu_hat, 1/risk_value AS lambda_hat FROM vulnerability_metadata) AS subquery

aggregations.time_weighted_raw_risk: SUM(vulnerability_metadata.risk_score * EXP(-EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_DATE - vulnerability_metadata.detected_time)) / 2592000)) / SUM(EXP(-EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_DATE - vulnerability_metadata.detected_time)) / 2592000))

results.description: CALCULATED_COLUMN: Impact class determination and raw_impact calculation
results.question: Create a calculated column that determines impact_class (Mission Critical, Critical, Other) based on admin roles, bastion device status, and device_impact, then calculate raw_impact using that impact_class
results.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN (is_bastion_device = TRUE) OR (roles LIKE '%NW-ADMIN%' OR roles LIKE '%WIN-ADMIN%') THEN 'Mission Critical' WHEN (roles LIKE '%Critical%') THEN 'Critical' ELSE 'Other' END AS impact_class, CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN (is_bastion_device = TRUE) OR (roles LIKE '%NW-ADMIN%' OR roles LIKE '%WIN-ADMIN%') THEN 'Mission Critical' WHEN (roles LIKE '%Critical%') THEN 'Critical' ELSE 'Other' END) = 'Mission Critical' THEN ( SELECT numeric_score FROM risk_impact_metadata WHERE enum_type = 'impact_class' AND code = 'Mission Critical') WHEN (CASE WHEN (is_bastion_device = TRUE) OR (roles LIKE '%NW-ADMIN%' OR roles LIKE '%WIN-ADMIN%') THEN 'Mission Critical' WHEN (roles LIKE '%Critical%') THEN 'Critical' ELSE 'Other' END) = 'Critical' THEN ( SELECT numeric_score FROM risk_impact_metadata WHERE enum_type = 'impact_class' AND code = 'Critical') ELSE ( SELECT numeric_score FROM risk_impact_metadata WHERE enum_type = 'impact_class' AND code = 'Other') END AS raw_impact FROM dev_assets;

calculation_steps.description: Determine impact_class based on roles and bastion device status
calculation_steps.sql_expression: CASE WHEN (is_bastion_device = TRUE) OR (roles LIKE '%NW-ADMIN%' OR roles LIKE '%WIN-ADMIN%') THEN 'Mission Critical' WHEN (roles LIKE '%Critical%') THEN 'Critical' ELSE 'Other' END

calculation_steps.description: Calculate raw_impact based on the determined impact_class
calculation_steps.sql_expression: CASE WHEN impact_class = 'Mission Critical' THEN (SELECT numeric_score FROM risk_impact_metadata WHERE enum_type = 'impact_class' AND code = 'Mission Critical') WHEN impact_class = 'Critical' THEN (SELECT numeric_score FROM risk_impact_metadata WHERE enum_type = 'impact_class' AND code = 'Critical') ELSE (SELECT numeric_score FROM risk_impact_metadata WHERE enum_type = 'impact_class' AND code = 'Other') END

results.description: CALCULATED_COLUMN: Bastion impact for bastion devices
results.question: Calculate bastion_impact for all assets where is_bastion_device is true, using impact_class score and propagation_class impact
results.sql: WITH bastion_devices AS ( SELECT * FROM dev_assets WHERE is_bastion_device = TRUE), impact_class AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN rm.criticality_score >= 90 THEN 'Mission Critical' ELSE 'Other' END AS impact_class, da.roles FROM bastion_devices da JOIN roles_metadata rm ON da.roles = rm.code), propagation_class AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN <conditions for perimeter> THEN 'Perimeter' ELSE 'Core' END AS propagation_class FROM <network interfaces table> WHERE is_bastion_device = TRUE), impact_scores AS ( SELECT ic.impact_class, ri.numeric_score AS impact_score FROM impact_class ic JOIN risk_impact_metadata ri ON ri.enum_type = 'impact_class' AND ri.code = ic.impact_class), propagation_scores AS ( SELECT pc.propagation_class, ri.numeric_score AS propagation_score FROM propagation_class pc JOIN risk_impact_metadata ri ON ri.enum_type = 'propagation_class' AND ri.code = pc.propagation_class) SELECT LEAST((ps.propagation_score * 1.3) + (is.impact_score * 0.2), 100) AS bastion_impact FROM impact_scores is JOIN propagation_scores ps ON TRUE;

calculation_steps.description: Identify bastion devices from dev_assets where is_bastion_device is true.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT * FROM dev_assets WHERE is_bastion_device = TRUE

calculation_steps.description: Classify impact class for bastion devices using roles_metadata.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT CASE WHEN roles_metadata.criticality_score >= 90 THEN 'Mission Critical' ELSE 'Other' END AS calculated_impact_class FROM roles_metadata JOIN dev_assets ON dev_assets.roles = roles_metadata.code WHERE dev_assets.is_bastion_device = TRUE

calculation_steps.description: Retrieve numeric score for impact class from risk_impact_metadata.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT numeric_score FROM risk_impact_metadata WHERE enum_type = 'impact_class' AND code = calculated_impact_class

calculation_steps.description: Classify propagation class for bastion devices.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT CASE WHEN <conditions for perimeter> THEN 'Perimeter' ELSE 'Core' END AS calculated_propagation_class FROM <network interfaces table> WHERE dev_assets.is_bastion_device = TRUE

calculation_steps.description: Retrieve numeric score for propagation class from risk_impact_metadata.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT numeric_score FROM risk_impact_metadata WHERE enum_type = 'propagation_class' AND code = calculated_propagation_class

calculation_steps.description: Calculate bastion impact using the formula: bastion_impact = (propagation_score * 1.3) + (impact_score * 0.2). Cap the final score at 100.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT LEAST((propagation_score * 1.3) + (impact_score * 0.2), 100) AS bastion_impact

results.description: METRIC: Average risk scores by asset classification
results.question: Show me average raw_impact, raw_likelihood, and raw_risk by asset classification type (canonical_type, device_type) with calculated risk ratios
results.sql: SELECT device_type, AVG(raw_impact) AS average_raw_impact, AVG(raw_likelihood) AS average_raw_likelihood, AVG(raw_risk) AS average_raw_risk, AVG(raw_impact) / NULLIF(AVG(raw_risk), 0) AS risk_ratio FROM dev_assets GROUP BY device_type;

calculation_steps.description: Calculate average raw_impact grouped by device_type
calculation_steps.sql_expression: AVG(raw_impact)

calculation_steps.description: Calculate average raw_likelihood grouped by device_type
calculation_steps.sql_expression: AVG(raw_likelihood)

calculation_steps.description: Calculate average raw_risk grouped by device_type
calculation_steps.sql_expression: AVG(raw_risk)

calculation_steps.description: Calculate risk ratio as raw_impact to raw_risk
calculation_steps.sql_expression: AVG(raw_impact) / NULLIF(AVG(raw_risk), 0)
